have h₁ : (pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams) = rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w p.outerParams := rfl
  simp only [h₁, rotproj_outer_unit]
  have h₂ : p.outer P = (p.outerm P : ℝ³) := rfl
  simp only [h₂]
  have h₃ : p.outerm P = (p.outermat p.θ p.φ : Matrix (Fin 3) (Fin 3) ℝ) * P := by
    simp [p.outerm, p.outermat]
    <;>
    simp_all [Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
    <;>
    ring_nf
  have h₄ : (p.outermat p.θ p.φ : Matrix (Fin 3) (Fin 3) ℝ) = (rotM p.θ p.φ : Matrix (Fin 3) (Fin 3) ℝ) := by
    simp [p.outermat]
    <;>
    ext i j
    <;>
    fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;>
    simp [rotM, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one,
      Fin.val_two]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    linarith
  have h₅ : p.outerm P = (rotM p.θ p.φ : Matrix (Fin 3) (Fin 3) ℝ) * P := by
    rw [h₃, h₄]
  have h₆ : ⟪(pc.w : ℝ²), (p.outerm P : ℝ³)⟫ = ⟪(pc.w : ℝ²), ((rotM p.θ p.φ : Matrix (Fin 3) (Fin 3) ℝ) * P : ℝ³)⟫ := by
    rw [h₅]
  have h₇ : (p.outerParams : ℝ²) = (⟨p.θ, p.φ⟩ : ℝ²) := by
    simp [p.outerParams]
  have h₈ : (rotM (p.outerParams.1) (p.outerParams.2) P : ℝ³) = (rotM p.θ p.φ P : ℝ³) := by
    simp [h₇]
    <;>
    ext i <;> fin_cases i <;>
    simp [rotM, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one,
      Fin.val_two]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    linarith
  simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero]
  <;>
  field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero, norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos, Real.sqrt_pos, h₈]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>

have h₁ : pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams = ⟪pc.w, (p.rotM (P 1) (P 2))⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
    simp [rotproj_outer_unit, pc.fu_outer, inner]

  have h₂ : ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ = ⟪pc.w, (p.rotM (P 1) (P 2))⟫ := by
    simp_all [OuterMap, inner]
    <;>
    simp_all [rotM, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, real_inner_mV]

    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    linarith
    <;>
    aesop

  calc
    pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams * ‖P‖ = (⟪pc.w, (p.rotM (P 1) (P 2))⟫ / ‖P‖) * ‖P‖ := by rw [h₁]
    _ = ⟪pc.w, (p.rotM (P 1) (P 2))⟫ := by
      by_cases h₃ : ‖(P : ℝ³)‖ = 0
      · -- If ‖P‖ = 0, then P = 0
        have h₄ : (P : ℝ³) = 0 := by
          simpa [norm_eq_abs] using h₃
        simp_all [h₄, OuterMap, inner]
        <;>
        simp_all [rotM, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, real_inner_mV]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
        <;>
        aesop
      · -- If ‖P‖ ≠ 0, use field_simp to cancel out ‖P‖
        field_simp [h₃]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
        <;>
        aesop
    _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by rw [h₂]
